automaticFloors.when: authenticated transcript lacks required sealed evidence

anchors.taskCompletion: 0 blocked; 5 blocked-task maximum; 15 every core task completes efficiently
anchors.informationArchitecture: 0 nouns/navigation fail; 10 grouping, location, and adjacency are clear
anchors.discoverability: 0 task is obscured; 10 primary action and purpose are immediately legible
anchors.interactionFeedback: 0 no acknowledgement/state; 10 every action acknowledges within 400ms with explicit states
anchors.errorPreventionRecovery: 0 costly errors unguarded; 5 guarded, recoverable errors preserve values
anchors.mobileResponsive: 0 core task fails at mobile; 5 completes at 390 and reflows at 320 without overflow
anchors.accessibility: 0 inaccessible primary path; 5 keyboard, focus, labels, targets, contrast verified
anchors.typographySpacingConsistency: 0 inconsistent; 5 one working scale and spacing system
anchors.purposeFit: 0 mismatched register; 5 aesthetic fits the surface
